description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Dior Homme Eau de Toilette is intriguingly powerful and appealingly fresh. Dior Homme redefines a new, masculine sensuality in a polyphony of smooth and raw wood. A heart of tender wood, in which the virility of Atlas Cedar embraces the enveloping warmth of Haitian Vetiver tinged with spice. Wood hand-chiseled by Dior. Dior Homme conveys all the facets of modern masculinity. A man, yes, but a man of many nuances: confident in both his strength and his tenderness. Dior Homme Eau de Toilette is a fragrance with a bold trail that leaves a sensual imprint. ingredients #13837/A ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � ETHYLHEXYL METHOXYCINNAMATE � HYDROXYCITRONELLAL � LINALOOL � HEXYL CINNAMAL � CITRONELLOL � DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE � BHT � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � ETHYLHEXYL SALICYLATE � COUMARIN � CITRAL � GERANIOL � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � TOCOPHEROL � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 60730 (EXT. description: Fragrance - Ambery, Woody and Floral Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Discover Dior Homme Parfum reinvented by Francis Kurkdjian, Perfume Creative Director. A men's fragrance crafted around a dual iris note, both airy and intense. The olfactory interpretation of modern masculinity, a balance between strength and tenderness. Dior Homme Parfum is the story of an encounter: the smooth, carnal notes of iris meet powerful ambery wood accords. A trail that expresses a masculine twist on the flower, with an overdose of iris creating an addictive, sensual, and elegant composition. The structure of the fragrance, airy yet dense, takes shape in a monolithic bottle with clean lines and a sensual color gradient. ingredients #21722 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � CITRUS AURANTIUM BERGAMIA (BERGAMOT) PEEL OIL � TETRAMETHYL ACETYLOCTAHYDRONAPHTHALENES � LIMONENE � LINALYL ACETATE � LINALOOL � COUMARIN � ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE � PINENE � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � CITRUS AURANTIUM PEEL OIL � LAVANDULA OIL/EXTRACT � POGOSTEMON CABLIN OIL � GERANYL ACETATE � DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE � CAMPHOR � CITRAL � BETA-CARYOPHYLLENE � TERPINEOL � TERPINOLENE � GERANIOL � ALPHA-TERPINENE � ROSE KETONES � CINNAMOMUM ZEYLANICUM BARK OIL � CINNAMAL � FARNESOL � EUGENOL � ISOEUGENOL � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) application tips 1. Awaken the senses with the invigorating notes of Dior Homme shower gel. 2. Soften your skin with Dior Homme after-shave balm. 3. Refresh with Dior Homme deodorant. 4. Spray on Dior Homme Parfum for the finishing touch. olfactory notes Heart Notes AMBERY ACCORD A gourmet ambery accord where the density of patchouli meets a powerful vetiver, mingled with a note of coumarin and dry accents of cut hay. description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Discover Dior Homme Parfum reinvented by Francis Kurkdjian, Perfume Creative Director. Eau de Toilette - Fresh, Woody and Spicy Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Energetic and elegant, the new Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette combines fresh vivacity and charm tinted with sensuality for a duo that strikes like a boxer's uppercut. Vibrant, explosive, the opening signature of Dior Homme Sport is marked by citrus and the open air, freshness and movement. For this new Dior Homme Sport, the Dior Perfumer-Creator chose to tinge the composition with warm and amber notes, wrap it in spices and round it out with woody notes. The confident trail of Dior Homme Sport incarnates a masculinity entwined with smooth, noble qualtiy. The new Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette plays freshness and sensuality. It's a luminous scent enriched with a new, lasting impression that takes hold and lingers like a caress. ingredients #16128 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � LINALOOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � HEXYL CINNAMAL � CITRAL � CITRONELLOL � TRIETHYL CITRATE � EUGENOL � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � CINNAMAL � GERANIOL � TRIS(TETRAMETHYLHYDROXYPIPERIDINOL) CITRATE � EVERNIA FURFURACEA (TREEMOSS) EXTRACT � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) application tips Prolong the trail of Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette with the Dior Homme ritual: 1. Awaken the senses with the invigorating notes of Dior Homme shower gel. 2. Soften your skin with Dior Homme after-shave balm. 3. Get that fresh feeling with Dior Homme spray deodorant. olfactory notes Base Notes Frankincense and Woody Notes Frankincense appears for the first time at the heart of Dior Homme Sport, heightened and generous. It inspires a heavenly intensity that melds with the woods and amber, emblematic signatures of Dior Homme. Heart Notes Elemi and Pink Pepper This thunderous departure is enriched with intense fresh notes, like the ultra-powerful, resinous and lemony Elemi that enters into dialogue with the juicy citrus and further heightens its expressiveness. Explosive, the peppery spice of Pink Pepper joins in the dance of the new fragrance's composition. Top Notes Reggio di Calabria Bergamot An absolute signature of vibrant top notes, Reggio di Calabria Bergamot is a juicy, zesty and distinguished gust of wind, upheld by an Italian Lemon note. It's a knock to the senses, an appeal to an irresistible freshness now propelled by a vibrant aldehyde note. A MEMBER OF THE UNION FOR ETHICAL BIOTRADE, DIOR IS COMMITTED TO A SOURCING THAT IS RESPECTFUL OF NATURE AND COMMUNITIES. description: Solid Perfume Refill - Velvety and Sensual Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description The Miss Dior Eau de Parfum Mini Miss solid perfume is refillable: once finished, replace your fragrance stick with a new refill for continued use. For the 1st time, the House of Dior has developed an alcohol-free solid perfume formula with a clear finish and made from * natural-origin ingredients. Enriched with rose wax, this solid perfume leaves skin feeling soft and moisturized. The stick offers a moment of sensorial indulgence with each touch-up thanks to its non-sticky and comfortable texture. Miss Dior Eau de Parfum Mini Miss is characterized by a velvety and sensual signature, reigned over by a rose note highlighted by accents of fresh lily-of-the-valley, a peony accord and a powdery iris note. The solid perfume refill is sold separately. * Amount calculated based on the ISO 16128-1 and ISO 16128-2 standard. description: Alcohol-Free Fragrance Stick - Intense Floral, Fruity and Woody Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Miss Dior Parfum is reinvented in an alcohol-free solid perfume with a sheer finish, to apply the intense floral, fruity and woody notes of the fragrance directly to the skin. A mini-object with maxi-effects, Miss Dior Parfum solid perfume is highly concentrated to prolong the scent of Miss Dior Parfum. Infused with rose wax, the stick melts comfortably onto the skin, without any sticky residue, leaving it fragrant and hydrated. The solid perfume is applied on pulse points (neck, d�collet�, wrists) on its own or as complementary touch-ups to the spray. Miss Dior Parfum Mini Miss is housed in a jacquard case woven with the houndstooth pattern, a signature of the Dior wardrobe style. Musk Aura is an enchanting fragrance that combines the allure of delicate rose and jasmine with the irresistible sensuality of musk. Specially crafted to capture the essence of island evenings, where the warm tropical breeze carries the intoxicating aroma of blooming flowers, setting the stage for intimate encounters and unforgettable moments of romance and seduction. Heady notes of florals intertwine with the fresh and lively essence of sweet apples, creating an aura of femininity and grace. The base notes anchor the fragrance with the allure of musk. A blend of velvety white musk and subtle hints of amber and nectarine create a seductive foundation that wraps you in a warm and intimate embrace. Musk Aura is the embodiment of seduction and passion under the stars. It's the perfect companion for evenings spent on a secluded beach or dancing under the moonlight. description: Mykonos - On The Rocks Extrait de Parfum 100ml "I want something sweet, boozy, aromatic, and bold... but make it On The Rocks." The first spritz is a crisp splash of bergamot and apple, fresh and invigorating, before the rich depth of myrrh swirls in�smooth, warm, and seductively bold, like an amber liquor poured slow. As the scent settles, the smoky elegance of guaiacwood and the floral sensuality of orange flower unfold, while a hint of praline lingers like the lingering sweetness of an irresistible sip. Finally, vanilla and ambroxan melt into the skin, wrapping you in a trail that�s both sultry and dangerously smooth�the scent of a night you�ll never forget. Crisp yet deep. Smooth yet daring. Indulgent yet refined. This is your dream drink, bottled. One spritz, and you�re hooked. description: Mykonos - Paradise Extrait de Parfum 50ml When Cuba meets Bali. The dry down is calming, therapeutic, and sensual while the fruits leave a subtle trail of brightness. They are followed by honeyed and musky accords, giving way to an intense, unexpected trail. Eau de Parfum - Citrus and Vanilla Notes - Refillable description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Inspiration for the creation of Sauvage Eau de Parfum was taken from the desert in the magical hour of twilight: mixed with the coolness of the night, the burning desert air exudes profound scents. Sauvage Eau de Parfum is thus the olfactory interpretation of a moment tinted with a thick blue that unleashes the wildest instincts. In the hour when the wolves come out and the sky is set ablaze, a new magic unfolds. Sauvage Eau de Parfum teams the freshness of a juicy, spicy Calabrian bergamot note with the sensuality of a mysterious and enveloping Papua New Guinean vanilla extract accord to unfurl a powerful and noble trail. The 100 ml bottle of Sauvage Eau de Parfum is now refillable with the Sauvage Eau de Parfum refill. It can also be refilled at the Sauvage Refill Station, available at selected sales locations. This innovative system is part of Dior's sustainable development initiative, which aims to improve the House of Dior's impact on the climate, resources and waste. ingredients #16095 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � LINALOOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � TRIETHYL CITRATE � COUMARIN � CITRONELLOL � CITRAL � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � GERANIOL � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 42090 (BLUE 1) � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) application tips 1. Cleanse with Sauvage Shower Gel. 2. Hydrate your skin with Sauvage Moisturizer for Face and Beard. 3. Complete the Sauvage ritual by applying Sauvage Eau de Parfum on pulse points: wrists and neck. olfactory notes Heart Notes Papua New Guinean Vanilla Extract Papua New Guinean vanilla extract unfurls an irresistibly delicious attraction with smoky accents that render it more virile. Harvested green and then scalded, this exceptional vanilla is processed using a solvent-free extraction method to restore the complex power of its aromas while preserving the environment. Top Notes Reggio di Calabria Bergamot This bergamot is a whirlwind of juicy freshness that seems to sweep up everything in its trail. Elixir - Spicy, Fresh and Woody Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Sauvage Elixir is an extraordinarily* concentrated fragrance steeped in the emblematic freshness of Sauvage with an intoxicating heart of spices, a "tailor-made" lavender essence and a blend of rich woods forming the signature of its powerful, lavish and captivating trail. The Sauvage Elixir fragrance was created like a fine liqueur made of exceptional ingredients. This concentration was made possible by the exceptional quality of the raw materials: Sauvage Elixir is a fragrance as unique and rare as a red moon in the night sky. Sauvage Elixir concentrates all of its power in a midnight blue lacquered glass bottle in a unique* 60 ml size. This precious bottle, shaped like a vial, features multiple sophisticated designs: the magical name of the fragrance is inscribed in shiny silver on a label engraved right into the glass. The dome-shaped bottom engraved with the CD logo marks its silhouette. * At Dior.1 ingredients #15755 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LINALOOL � LIMONENE � COUMARIN � CITRONELLOL � EUGENOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � TRIETHYL CITRATE � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � GERANIOL � CINNAMAL � CITRAL � EVERNIA FURFURACEA (TREEMOSS) EXTRACT � FARNESOL � ISOEUGENOL � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) � CI 19140 (YELLOW 5) � CI 42090 (BLUE 1) application tips 1. Cleanse your skin with Sauvage Shower Gel. 2. Soothe razor burn with Sauvage After-shave Lotion. >3. Apply Sauvage Elixir on pulse points. olfactory notes Base Notes Rich woods An ambery accord, the powerful Sauvage signature, reveals its full range of velvety and sensual nuances. Enveloping, it blankets the base heightened with a sweet, smooth licorice note. Haitian vetiver and a patchouli heart form the link between these rich woods. Heart Notes Essence of AOP lavender from Nyons A blend of several carefully selected harvests, this AOP essence from Nyons reveals unique* facets and releases notes that are as close as possible to the wild flower. Fresh but not camphorous, graced with a vanilla-tinged coumarin note, it is rich, fine and floral. Top Notes Grapefruit note and heart of spices Top notes burst with a lively, persistent grapefruit note and heady spices. Some, like the essences of cinnamon and nutmeg, play with heat and sensuality, while others are more refreshing, like the zesty and aromatic cardamom.
